h1.visual_description: Bold, sans-serif font, significantly larger than body text, used for section titles or table captions. Includes a colon after the label.
h1.example_text: Table: The number of accredited observers as of 28 April 2022

h2.visual_description: Not explicitly present in this snippet, but inferred as bold sans-serif of slightly smaller scale than H1.

visual_matchers.pattern: Alternating light blue and white row shading in tables
Horizontal rules at the top and bottom of table headers and at the end of the table
Superscript numerals in body text and table titles

markdown_grammar.table_style: markdown (standard grid with alignment; use HTML if cell shading must be preserved)
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Footnote style with a horizontal separator line at the bottom of the page, using numerical indices and URLs.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Top-right running header (e.g., 'Civil Society Engagement'), bottom-left footnote area separated by a short line, and bottom-right page numbering.
